bug.description: cross-layer parameter mismatch between PHY, MAC, and RRC causing inconsistent operation

prompt:
There is a cross-layer parameter mismatch between PHY, MAC, and RRC causing inconsistent operation downstream of function mac_remove_nr_ue in the openair2/LAYER2/NR_MAC_gNB subsystem.
The function is located at openair2/LAYER2/NR_MAC_gNB/gNB_scheduler_primitives.c:3105.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
